title: Vaangana Vanakangana Lyrics Thalaivaa Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
What bro ?, nadanam ?
song ah? ..baangu..
yaar anngae.. bro-ku oru baangu

Vaangana vanakangana
my song-a ne kelungana
naa olrala olaralana
romba feelingu feelinguna

Hey aanaana oohnaana
un aala thaedi pova
nee venaanu ponaina
nee dhevadhaasaa aava
ava late-ah thaana
tata solluva pinnaala pogaadha

Ye oothiko oothiko oothikona
manasa ne konjam thaethikana
Quater-u water-u serndhuchuna
kottudhu kadhal thathuvamna

Vaangana vanakangana
my song-a ne kelungana
naa olrala olaralana
romba feelingu feelinguna

Life-u oru boatukanga
safety-ah otungana
love-ula maattikitta
sethula sikkidumna

Hittler-u torture ellaam
history pesudhunna
ivalunga torture ellaam
yaaarumey pesalanna
(factu factu)

Whisky bear bodhathaan
mooney hour-il pogumna
hasky voice-il pesuva
pogaadhu andha podhanna

Ye oothiko oothiko oothikona
manasa ne konjam thaethikana
Quater-u water-u serndhuchuna
kottudhu kadhal thathuvamna

Vaangana vanakangana
my song-a ne kelungana
naa olrala olaralana
romba feelingu feelinguna

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Vaangana Vanakangana is a lively song that celebrates friendship and fun, showcasing the carefree spirit of youth.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Thalaivaa, this song is a pivotal moment that highlights the protagonist's vibrant personality and his connection with friends.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Vijay and composed by GV PrakashKumar, known for their successful collaborations in Tamil cinema.

When was the song released?

Vaangana Vanakangana was released on May 1, 2013, as part of the Thalaivaa soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vaangana Vanakangana, the exuberance of youth is beautifully captured through lively beats and catchy lyrics. The song serves as a celebration of friendship and the joy of living in the moment, resonating with the audience's spirit. Set against the backdrop of Thalaivaa, it evokes feelings of happiness and energy, making it a perfect anthem for parties and celebrations. With Vijay's charismatic performance, this track leaves a lasting impression of joy and camaraderie.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vaangana Vanakangana is a vibrant anthem that perfectly captures the essence of celebration and joy. With Vijay's electrifying vocals and GV PrakashKumar's dynamic composition, this track is sure to get you on your feet. Dive into the infectious energy of Thalaivaa and let the music take over!
stanzaMeanings: What bro? Is this a song? Come on... who is this? It's for my bro.
What? Again a song? A song... where is our song?
Vaangana vanakangana, listen to my song, I feel it deeply.
Hey, if you want to find someone, you need to go. If you want to go, you should say it clearly, otherwise don't leave.
Hey, think about it, think about it. If your heart is a little troubled, mixing quarter and water will help with love advice.
Vaangana vanakangana, listen to my song, I feel it deeply.
Life is like a boat, if you want safety, you need to change in love.
Hitler's torture is all history, but if they talk about torture, no one speaks up (factually).
Whiskey bear, when it goes to the moon hour, it won't speak in a husky voice at that time.
Did you see? If you fall, I won't get up.
Hey, think about it, think about it. If your heart is a little troubled, mixing quarter and water will help with love advice.
Vaangana vanakangana, listen to my song, I feel it deeply.
Yes, yes, go ahead, go ahead...
